query: What is the relationship between SPKEZ and SPKEZR?
answer: `SPKEZ` computes the state of a target body relative to an observing body, while `SPKEZR` computes the same state, but allows the user to specify the precision of the light time correction [file:../data/spice/src/spicelib/spkez.f:3-1345]. `SPKEZ` calls `SPKEZR` [file:../data/spice/src/spicelib/spkez.f:3-1345].
